title: TTRP Canes!
description: Your One Stop Shop for all your TTRP Cane needs!
body:
Canes. We need more Canes. Can't have enough Canes.
Indeed.

A collection of canes intended for TTRP, a fantasy roleplay server.
Want some canes? Take a stick or your trusty sickle or iron hoe and rename it to the cane you want! Simple as that.
